summary: A high‑energy, hyper‑driven show captured on a solid soundboard recording.
review: The reviewer hails this concert as one of the best of the tour, noting that the band was in “hyperdrive” and delivering a strong performance. The recording is described as good, likely sourced from a soundboard (or video tape feed), with no major flaws mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; strong praise for both performance and recording, but limited data prevents a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and balanced sound; reviewer suggests an even better board may exist, implying the current source is decent but not top‑tier.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic, hyper‑driven set described as one of the tour's highlights.
